commonRequiredFields.description: Fields required on all EU invoices per VAT Directive 2006/112/EC Article 226

fields.description: VAT identification number of the supplier
VAT ID of customer (required for B2B cross-border)
Description, quantity, unit price for each item/service
Date of supply (if different from invoice date)

additionalRequired.description: SIRET number for French businesses (14 digits)
Buyer reference / routing ID for B2G (Leitweg-ID)
Órgano Gestor, Unidad Tramitadora, Oficina Contable for B2G
SII registration data for real-time reporting
Unique document code (ATCUD) — mandatory since Jan 2024
QR code with invoice data for tax authority
RO e-Factura index number (assigned by system)

reverseCharge.description: Reverse charge mechanism — VAT liability shifts to the buyer

rules.condition: Supplier and customer in different EU member states, both VAT-registered
rules.supplierAction: Issue invoice without VAT, include customer VAT ID, add reverse charge note
rules.customerAction: Self-assess VAT at local rate, report in VAT return
invoiceRequirements: Net amount only, no VAT charged

rules.scenario: Intra-EU B2B supply of services (general rule)
rules.condition: B2B services where place of supply is customer's country (Art. 44)
rules.supplierAction: Issue invoice without VAT, reverse charge applies

rules.condition: Specific sectors (construction, scrap metal, etc.) — varies by country
rules.supplierAction: Issue invoice without VAT with domestic reverse charge note

rules.condition: Supplier outside EU, customer is EU VAT-registered business
rules.customerAction: Self-assess VAT at local rate, may need to report import VAT

oss.name: One-Stop Shop (OSS)
oss.description: Simplified VAT reporting for cross-border B2C sales within the EU

schemes.name: Union OSS
schemes.scope: Intra-EU B2C supply of goods and services by EU-established businesses
schemes.threshold: EUR 10,000 combined cross-border B2C sales (per calendar year)
schemes.aboveThreshold: Charge destination country VAT rate, report via OSS in country of establishment
schemes.reporting: Quarterly OSS return via country of identification
schemes.registration: Single registration in member state of establishment

schemes.name: Non-Union OSS
schemes.scope: B2C services by non-EU businesses to EU consumers
schemes.threshold: No threshold — applies from first sale
schemes.reporting: Quarterly return via chosen member state of identification
schemes.registration: Register in any one EU member state

schemes.name: Import OSS (IOSS)
schemes.scope: Distance sales of imported goods up to EUR 150
schemes.threshold: Goods value max EUR 150 per consignment
schemes.aboveThreshold: Charge destination country VAT at point of sale, goods import VAT-exempt
schemes.registration: Register in any EU member state (intermediary required for non-EU businesses)
